name: @curvenote/task-converter-cloudrun
description: Cloud Run deployment for task-converter service

scripts.build:service: bash -c 'cd ../../packages/task-converter && npm install && npm run build && rm -rf ../../services/task-converter/dist && cp -r dist ../../services/task-converter/ && rm -rf ../../services/task-converter/typst-plain && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/curvenote-themes/typst-plain ../../services/task-converter/typst-plain'
scripts.build:local: npm run build:service && docker build -t task-converter-local .
